scripts.dev: npm run build --workspace @school-erp/shared && concurrently -n api,owner,employee,school -c blue,cyan,yellow,magenta "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:owner" "npm run dev:employee" "npm run dev:school"
scripts.dev:api: npm run build --workspace @school-erp/shared && npm run dev --workspace @school-erp/api
scripts.dev:portals: concurrently -n owner,employee,school -c cyan,yellow,magenta "npm run dev:owner" "npm run dev:employee" "npm run dev:school"
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @school-erp/shared && npm run build --workspace @school-erp/api && npm run build --workspace @school-erp/owner && npm run build --workspace @school-erp/employee && npm run build --workspace @school-erp/school && npm run build --workspace @school-erp/mobile
scripts.test: npm run build --workspace @school-erp/shared && npm run test --workspace @school-erp/api && npm run test --workspace @school-erp/owner && npm run test --workspace @school-erp/employee && npm run test --workspace @school-erp/school && npm run test --workspace @school-erp/mobile
scripts.lint: npm run build --workspace @school-erp/shared && npm run typecheck --workspace @school-erp/shared && npm run typecheck --workspace @school-erp/api && npm run lint --workspace @school-erp/owner && npm run lint --workspace @school-erp/employee && npm run lint --workspace @school-erp/school && npm run lint --workspace @school-erp/mobile
scripts.typecheck: npm run build --workspace @school-erp/shared && npm run typecheck --workspace @school-erp/shared && npm run typecheck --workspace @school-erp/api && npm run typecheck --workspace @school-erp/owner && npm run typecheck --workspace @school-erp/employee && npm run typecheck --workspace @school-erp/school && npm run typecheck --workspace @school-erp/mobile
